signals.headline: CEASEFIRE AGREEMENT REACHED | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
CEASEFIRE AGREEMENT REACHED | YES | HIGH confidence**
A two-week ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran was announced on Tuesday, April 7, with President Trump stating there would be "positive action" following negotiations[1]. Trump suspended bombing and military action for two weeks to allow both sides to negotiate a "definitive Agreement concerning Longterm PEACE with Iran"[1].
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
Trump announces end of military operations against Iran by A
Trump announces US x Iran ceasefire end by April 21, 2026?

signals.headline: RENEWED TALKS SIGNALED | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
RENEWED TALKS SIGNALED | YES | HIGH confidence**
Trump signaled that fresh talks with Iran could take place in Pakistan "over the next two days" (as of Tuesday, April 14)[6]. Pakistani Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar confirmed Pakistan will try to advance U.S.-Iran dialogue in the coming days[3].

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% (Up from 2.0%, Below 2.4% Forecast) | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, missing market expectations of 2.4% and remaining near the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid contained price pressures.[1]  
Alternative sources report slightly varying figures for March (2.

signals.headline: STRAIT OF HORMUZ BLOCKADE INITIATED | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
STRAIT OF HORMUZ BLOCKADE INITIATED | YES | HIGH confidence**
Following the ceasefire talks yielding no deal, Trump announced a U.S. blockade of Iranian ports beginning Monday, April 13 at 10:00 a.m. ET[3]. The blockade has entered its second day as of April 14, with reports indicating six ships have been turned back[5].

signals.headline: CRITICAL DEADLINE APPROACHING | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
CRITICAL DEADLINE APPROACHING | YES | HIGH confidence**
The temporary ceasefire is set to expire on April 22[6], creating pressure on both sides to reach a permanent agreement or face potential escalation. The blockade continues to mount economic pressure on Iran while affecting Asian economies reliant on the Strait of Hormuz for oil supplies[6].
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
Trump announces US x Iran ceasefire end by April 21, 2026?
US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 22, 2026?
